title: cyclosorus rurutensis
intro: Cyclosorus rurutensis is a type of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to the Pacific Islands and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Polynesian medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Cyclosorus rurutensis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which is then consumed to reap its health benefits.
